title: O_o
meta: AI, Disklavier and human operator · Padova 2022

content.value: Named after an emoticon and an extinct Hawaiian bird. The last recording of its singing has been processed and multiplied by AI. Like Shelley's Creature, O_o looks for identity in its creator.
